blocks.text: Insert a flat-blade screwdriver or similar tool through the notch on the front side of the base cover (A) and push the claw (B) on the base.
Remove the visor (A) from the holder (B) and rotate it 45°, making sure the hook (C) slides into the base cover (D) while rotating.
Lower the visor (A) and remove the pin (C) of the base cover (B) from the hole (D) in the body.
Turn the holder (A) counterclockwise to remove it.
Vehicles equipped with side curtain airbags: If the side curtain airbags are deployed, replace them with new sun visors.

Vehicles equipped with side curtain airbags: If the side curtain airbags are not deployed, perform the following inspection and replace the applicable items, if any. If the visor holder is damaged, replace it with a new holder.

items.text: Cracks in base of sun visor stay (A)
Cracks in base of sun visor stay (A)
Cracks in base cover section (B) of sun visor stay
Cracks in base cover section (B) of sun visor stay
Bent or cracked shaft section (C) of visor stay
Bent or cracked shaft section (C) of visor stay
Sun visor (D) substrate damaged or cracked
Sun visor (D) substrate damaged or cracked
Sun visor vanity mirror (E) mounting area cracked
Sun visor vanity mirror (E) mounting area cracked

blocks.text: Installation is the reverse of the removal procedure.
